I'm very pleased stay in Mekkah Hotel.

reviews.reviewComments: The room is very ordinary, not up to expectations with that price. The reception area and breakfast room are very nice.
A good 3 star hotel with good breakfast. Staff were very pleasant. Have to admit that the room was a bit small...walking distance to food and shopping.
Kamar standard agak kecil & tidak ada jendela. Tetapi secara overall, hotel bagus, dekat dgn masjid Oman 👍

For a three star hotel, it’s a bit lacking, there’s no fridge inside the room, there’s no hot water, no hairdryer, they clean the bed everyday, but not the toilet/bathroom. :(

Note: standard room doesn’t have window. 

Good thing about the hotel is the receptionist and the doorman, they are very helpful. 

The location is good too.

reviews.originalComment:
Sy memilih hotel Mekkah karena lokasinya yang dekat tempat simposium di BMA (Balai Meuseuraya Aceh), naik GoCar sekitar 15-18 ribu. Proses cek in cepat, staff cepat tanggap, tetapi dr awal cek in, kamar sy nomer 219 sdh bermasalah. Kunci kartu pintu bermasalah hingga saya cek out (di hari terakhir  bahkan untuk membuka pintu harus dengan kunci manual dari staf. Kamar mandi tidak terawat & ada bau masuk dari saluran pembuangan. Di hari pertama , ada masalah juga dari flushing WC, tetapi segera ditangani & berfungsi baik.
Menu sarapan pagi standard utk taste & pilihan menu, sesuai dengan rate. Sekira tidak terpaksa sekali, mungkin saya tidak akan merekomendasikan hotel ini, kecuali bila ada perbaikan berarti utk sarana & prasarana. Terimakasih.,
reviews.reviewComments: I chose the Makkah hotel because of its proximity to the symposium location at BMA (Balai Meuseuraya Aceh), about 15-18 thousand by GoCar. The check-in process was quick, and the staff was responsive, but from the beginning of check-in, my room number 219 had issues. The door key card was problematic until I checked out (even on the last day, I had to open the door with a manual key from the staff). The bathroom was not well-maintained and there was an unpleasant smell coming from the drainage. On the first day, there was also a problem with the toilet flushing, but it was promptly addressed and worked well afterward. The breakfast menu was standard in terms of taste and options, in line with the rate. Unless absolutely necessary, I probably would not recommend this hotel, unless there are significant improvements to the facilities. Thank you.

reviews.reviewTitle: Friendly staff, but the room was just okay
reviews.reviewComments:
The staff, including receptionist, bell boy, and restaurant staff, were very friendly and accomodating.
The hotel room was not quite so good. I stayed at standard room. Overall, the cleanliness in the bedroom area was good, but the en-suite bathroom that I had problem with. The toilet didn't even have a close lid for the water tank, but it worked just fine actually. The curtain was pretty dirty in the bottom. However, the hot water worked very well.
The staff cleaned the room everyday, even without me asking for it. And they replaced the amenities and the complimentary water bottle as well.

reviews.reviewTitle: Convenient Hotel but the dining area had too many flies
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is conveniently located in Banda Aceh and had all the basic amenities. However, the dining area had too many flies and I felt could have been managed better.

reviews.reviewTitle: Center hotel in Banda Aceh (Cheap Hotel)
reviews.reviewPositives: cheap price, Small room, city central

reviews.reviewComments: Old hotel in Aceh and need more improvement in many points
So so

1. wifi is not working well during my stay even only available in lobby
2. toilet a bit dirty
3. water from shower so dirty but they fixed it when complaint
4. Overall, ok.. customer service is friendly.
reviews.reviewPositives: convenient. easy to take public transport, cheap

reviews.reviewComments: The staff were generally friendly and helpful, Great Location and Great Facility
Staff front counter are very helpful. not much variety for breakfast. But overall are ok.

It was my first time staying in Mekkah Hotel, though it's the second time I visited Banda Aceh. The early check-in policy (from 5am) was really helpful, since my arrival to Banda Aceh from Medan was at the early morning. The staff is kind, friendly, and helpful. Since there is no refrigerator in my room, I asked them to entrust the foods that I bought in Medan into their freezer so I can bring back them again while I check-out later. The bed and the bathroom was okay: they're clean and the hot water worked perfectly. But I kinda surprise they don't have any satellite television, so the LED TV in the room only showed the national station. The WiFi connection was great so I could finish my jobs during the trip. And I found this interesting: the Mekkah Hotel is next door to Madinah hotel. For Moslem, you feel like doing Hajj pilgrimage (Mekkah to Madinah). Hence I can say, my staying here was pleasant and memorable.

I enjoyed my stay. Banda Aceh hotels are generally poor, aging and over priced. This hotel is only a few years old and caters mainly for businessmen. It is situated around 2.5 km from town. there are plenty of batchas  if you need transport. The cheaper rooms have no windows.all rooms I believe are non smoking. The bed was good, air conditioning fine. The bathroom was a little worn but the water was hot. The room was cleaned everyday and toiletries and free water was replaced. Tv had only local channels, wi fi worked well. The breakfast was indonesian buffet which I like. So there was rice, fish/ chicken, egg, vegetables, bread, 2fruits, one juice and coffee. The staff were polite and welcoming. Little English is spoken but that is normal. I think this is a good Acenese hotel.
No hot water, and the bathroom seriously needs to be scrubbed clean.

Resepsionis bernama Nuri benar benar merusak mood saya utk beristirahat. Sewaktu saya cek in,Nuri selaku resepsionis dg angkuhnya tidak mau menerima cek in saya dgn alasan tdk ada kamar standar lg spt pesanan saya.saya dipersilakan mencari hotel lain atau saya bs menambah Rp 100.000, utk upgrade ke deluxe dan utk itu kamarnya tersedia.saya lalu menelepon pihak CS agoda,yg lgsg segera telpon ke resepsionis hotel ini.tetapi si Nuri tdk mengangkat telepon sama sekali.akhirnya pihak agoda telelpon ke hp saya dan saya ngotot minta Nuri mendengarnya.akhirnya dgn bantuan CS agoda yg sangat profesional,pihak hotel akhirnya memberikan kunci kamar ke saya tetapi tidak dgn rasa penyesalan dari nuri yg cuma berkata "ini kunci kamar anda.nanti masalahnya biar diselesaikan agoda dg manager saja" tanpa ada embel embel permohonan maaf atas insiden yg membuang waktu saya 30 menit. Akhir kata saya ucapkan terima kasih atas profesionalisme yg ditunjukkan CS agoda dan saya tdk ingin menginap lagi di hotel ini yg bs mempekerjakan org org tdk profesional spt Nuri.
Secara umum memuaskan tetapi listrik sering padam, pelayanan perlu ditingkatkan
